notes: "Garden Defenders" — a complete single-file mini PvZ. Plan documented in a header comment and followed. State machine: main menu / how-to / leaderboard / play / game-over. 5 lanes x 9 columns. Sun economy from sunflowers + sky drops. Four plants (Sunflower, Peashooter, Snow Pea with slow, Wall-nut) plus shovel, card cooldowns and affordability veils. Three zombie types (normal/cone/bucket) with armor and HP bars, 10 escalating waves with a finale, lawnmower last-defense per lane, projectiles, frost slow, particles + floating text, placement preview. Score + localStorage top-10 leaderboard with name entry and clear. Canvas-rendered art, scales to fit window, mouse + touch input.
